expectations.text: Output contains NO URLs in the Facebook post body text
Output contains NO emoji or special Unicode characters
Output uses Vietnamese language with proper diacritics
Output does NOT mention code architecture or technical implementation
Output focuses on user benefits: time saved, manual work replaced
expectations.evidence: Found benefit words: ['tiết kiệm', 'thời gian', 'tự động', 'automation', 'không cần', 'one person']

expectations.text: Output uses first-person 'mình' voice, NOT news-reporting style
Output includes a CTA directing readers to comments for links
Output is between 300-600 words per post
Hook does not start with 'Hôm nay mình chia sẻ'
expectations.evidence: Hook does not start with banned phrase
